## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Michael Weisbaum to discuss potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is a rapidly growing startup building AI-powered content workflows, raising Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Company aims to revolutionize knowledge work automation, starting with content/SEO services](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Seeking experienced managing directors to own business verticals and contribute to product development](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Michael has extensive background in digital marketing, SEO, and growth; currently at Dot Dash](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [Started in April 2023, first providing content services to clients](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Developed proprietary AI workflow engine and infrastructure starting September 2023](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Rapid growth: 35 clients, $6M ARR, targeting $22M ARR and 100 clients by end of year](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Recently closed Series A funding round](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Technology and Approach

  - [Built engine to create AI-powered workflows represented as code](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Workflows handle 80% of work, with human experts guiding the process](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Constantly evolving components and assembling methods](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Long-term vision: translate outcomes into AI-understandable workflows](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Collecting data to improve workflow assembly and outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Business Model and Strategy

  - [Currently delivering outcomes as a service (e.g., editorial, programmatic SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Plans to expand into other knowledge work areas beyond content](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Three-phase growth strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
    1.  AI-powered content services to build platform and modules
    2.  Expose APIs for individual tools (e.g., researcher, fact-checker)
    3.  Expand into other areas like hiring and recruiting

### Team Structure

  - [Hiring managing directors to own books of business](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Roles combine general management, product management, client strategy, and sales](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Seeking experienced professionals who have scaled operations at multiple companies](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)

### Market Opportunity and Differentiation

  - [Content and marketing services market estimated at $1 trillion](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Approach differs from other AI companies by starting with real-world outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Generating valuable "frontier data" through service delivery to improve AI models](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting (30-60 minutes) early next week to continue discussion](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Explore potential fit for Michael in a managing director role at fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
  - [Further discuss company vision, growth plans, and specific opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/2VqykSBQ8vzx3ui5VafcmDfixSmZr3k3?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
